data.hyperedge_name: <hyperedge>"Beneficiary changes may be made at any time by written request."
<hyperedge>"Accident must be the direct cause of death"
<hyperedge>"Death must occur within 90 days of accident"
<hyperedge>"1.3 EXCLUSION - SUICIDE: If death occurs by suicide within 2 years of the issue date, we will pay only the premiums paid, without interest."
<hyperedge>"'Disability' means the complete inability to perform the material and substantial duties of your regular occupation due to sickness or injury."
<hyperedge>"President and CEO, ProtectPlus Family Insurance Co."
<hyperedge>"Excludes: suicide, self-inflicted injury, war, aviation (as pilot/crew)"
<hyperedge>"No payment if insured was under influence of drugs/alcohol"
<hyperedge>"'Terminal Illness' means a condition expected to result in death within 24 months as certified by a physician."
<hyperedge>"Must exercise within 90 days of option date."
<hyperedge>"Allows purchase of additional coverage without medical underwriting:"
<hyperedge>"Waiver continues until you recover, return to work, or age 65"
<hyperedge>"Premium based on age and class at time of exercise."
<hyperedge>"May purchase up to $100,000 additional coverage per option date"
<hyperedge>"1.1 We will pay the death benefit if the insured dies while this policy is in force and all premiums have been paid."
<hyperedge>"Must submit annual proof of continuing disability"
<hyperedge>"Option dates: Ages 40, 43, 46, 49 and at birth/adoption of child"
<hyperedge>"Must exercise within 90 days of option date"
<hyperedge>"May access up to 95% of death benefit while living"
<hyperedge>"Premium based on age and class at time of exercise"
<hyperedge>"GRACE PERIOD: 31 days from due date. Coverage continues during grace period. If death occurs during grace period, unpaid premium will be deducted from death benefit."
<hyperedge>"1.2 Payment will be made to the beneficiary within 30 days of receiving satisfactory proof of death."
<hyperedge>"This policy is guaranteed renewable to age 95 at increased premiums shown in the renewal rate schedule."
<hyperedge>"Benefit reduced by actuarial discount (approximately 8% per year)"
<hyperedge>"Remaining death benefit paid to beneficiaries upon death"
<hyperedge>"You may convert all or part of this policy to permanent life insurance without evidence of insurability:"
<hyperedge>"Before the policy expiration date, or before your 70th birthday, whichever is earlier"
<hyperedge>"If you become chronically ill and cannot perform 2+ Activities of Daily Living (bathing, dressing, eating, toileting, transferring, continence):"
<hyperedge>"May access up to 2% of face amount per month"
<hyperedge>"Must be certified by licensed healthcare practitioner"
<hyperedge>"We will not contest this policy after it has been in force for 2 years during the insured's lifetime, except for non-payment of premiums."
<hyperedge>"The standard aviation exclusion has been waived for this policy based on the insured's declared private pilot activities."
<hyperedge>"Covers all natural and legally adopted children"
<hyperedge>"Additional premium of $175/year is included in the base premium."
<hyperedge>"Coverage includes death while: Operating or riding as a passenger in any aircraft"
<hyperedge>"'Chronic Illness' means the inability to perform at least 2 of 6 Activities of Daily Living for at least 90 days."
<hyperedge>"RIDER 1: WAIVER OF PREMIUM DUE TO DISABILITY"
<hyperedge>"Riders may be added or removed on any policy anniversary with 30 days written notice."
<hyperedge>"Children may convert to individual policy at age 25 without evidence of insurability, up to 5 times the rider amount"
<hyperedge>"Adding riders may require evidence of insurability."
<hyperedge>"Covered Children: Christopher Bennett Jr. (Age 8), Olivia Grace Bennett (Age 5)"
<hyperedge>"If you become totally disabled before age 60 and remain disabled for 6 consecutive months:"
<hyperedge>"Pays an additional $750,000 if death results from accidental injury:"
